plugin_webcam_desc: Access to PC optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin.
plugin_webcam_snap_desc: Activates the camera and saves an image in the 'scatti' folder.
plugin_webcam_save_dir_desc: Folder where acquired images are saved
plugin_webcam_stab_delay_desc: Delay in seconds before taking a shot to stabilize exposure
plugin_webcam_error_sensor: Error: Optical sensor not detected or busy.
plugin_webcam_snap_saved: Snapshot acquired. File stored at: {path}. You look interesting today, Admin.
